nodes.name: HubSpot Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives HubSpot webhook events. Configure in HubSpot > Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Subscription types: contact.creation, contact.propertyChange, deal.creation, deal.propertyChange, meeting.creation, engagement.creation

nodes.name: Normalize HubSpot Event
nodes.notes: Maps HubSpot contact/deal/meeting events. Note: HubSpot webhooks don't include full object data — add a 'Fetch Contact from HubSpot API' node between this and AI Summary for production use.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role":"user","content":"Write ONE concise sentence for a CRM journal entry. HubSpot event: {{$json.event_type}}. Contact: {{$json.contact_name}}. Object ID: {{$json.hubspot_object_id}}. Property changed: {{$json.hubspot_property}} = {{$json.hubspot_value}}. Context: {{$json.raw_summary}}"}]
